comment: Weights for the SessionStart envelope ranking of a role's owned units. Move 0 hand-tuned. Data, not code — weight tuning is a JSON edit. When the values prove out (or don't), bump schemaVersion and explain in commit. Per #2940 + Silas's gate:arch note on #2928.

active.comment: Score = sum of (weight × normalized signal). Higher score = more active = surfaced higher.

needsWork.comment: Score = sum of (weight × normalized signal). Higher score = more attention-debt = surfaced as needs-work.

ownershipMap.comment: Whether to inject the full flat {iri → role} map. true ≈ 150 lines added to envelope; false ≈ 0. Default true; flip to false if context budget pressure justifies.
